name: Astra Interceptor
description: A fast-response frame tuned for lane control and clean routing. It keeps pressure high without sacrificing precision.

trait.label: Slipstream Core
trait.description: Higher strafe speed and faster overdrive charging keep multiplier routes active.

name: Valkyrie Lancer
description: An offensive spearhead frame built to cash out pressure. Less forgiving, but its routing ceiling is higher.

trait.label: Frontline Vector
trait.description: Pushes passive score multiplier and combo-route growth for aggressive scoring.

name: Seraph Guard
description: A heavier command frame that trades speed for uptime. It stabilizes runs and gives overdrive more room to work.

trait.label: Aegis Loop
trait.description: Extra hull integrity and longer overdrive windows make high-value chains easier to preserve.
